open_questions: Card names US500.DWX; ported it to canonical SP500.DWX because US500.DWX is absent from dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.

Card does not define exact FVG geometry; implemented the standard three-closed-bar FVG around the post-sweep displacement bar (bullish low[c] > high[a], bearish high[c] < low[a]) so the rule is executable on gapless .DWX data.
Card requires a per-symbol spread gate but gives no cap; exposed spread_cap_pips with a default of 50 and only blocks genuinely positive wide spreads, never zero modeled spread.
Frontmatter lists M5 and M15 while the mechanical body names M5 as the entry timeframe; generated both setfile timeframes, with M5 retained as primary and used for smoke.

Frontmatter single_symbol_only=true was interpreted as per-symbol EA instances rather than a P2 basket restriction because target_symbols names both US500 and NDX and the Implementation Notes do not forbid multi-symbol registration.
build_smoke_framework_error: framework_error terminal dispatch status=no_capacity; no terminal assigned and smoke did not start
